disciplines.academyPathway: District Association Selection -> State Under-14/16/19/23 Trials -> Ranji Trophy / State Senior Team -> IPL Selection -> Indian National Cricket Team Selection
Local Club Academy (AIFF Accredited) -> District/State Youth Leagues -> Santosh Trophy / State Team -> I-League / ISL Clubs -> Indian National Football Team
School/Sub-Junior Nationals -> Hockey India Academy Selection -> Junior National Camp -> Hockey India League / State Team -> Senior Indian National Hockey Team
School Sports Meet -> District & State Athletic Meets -> National Junior/Senior Athletics Championship -> SAI Centre of Excellence Training -> National Camp -> Olympics / World Championships
District Ranking Tournaments -> State Championships -> National Ranking Tournaments (BAI) -> Gopichand/Padukone Academy Selection -> National Camp -> International BWF Tournaments
AITA Talent Series (TS) -> Championship Series (CS) -> National Series (NS) -> National Championships -> ITF Junior Circuit -> Davis Cup / Fed Cup / ATP & WTA Tours
Traditional Akhadas / School Level -> Cadet Nationals -> Junior Nationals -> National Wrestling Championship -> SAI Special Training Centres -> Olympics / Commonwealth / World Championships
District Level Tournaments -> State Youth/Senior Championships -> National Boxing Championships -> Army Sports Institute / SAI Elite Center Selection -> National Camp -> International Championships
District Aquatic Meets -> State Swimming Championships -> Junior & Senior National Aquatic Championships -> Specialized Swim Academies (e.g., Dolphin Academy) -> International Swimming Meets

District Rifle Association Matches -> State Championships -> National Selection Trials (NRAI) -> National Shooting Championship -> Target Olympic Podium Scheme (TOPS) Support -> ISSF World Cups / Olympics
District Gymnastics Meets -> State Championships -> National Gymnastics Championships -> National Camps -> International Cups & World Artistic Gymnastics Championships
School Games Federation of India (SGFI) -> Sub-Junior/Junior Nationals -> State Senior Team Selection -> Pro Kabaddi League (PKL) Auction -> Indian National Kabaddi Team

schemes.name: Sports Quota
schemes.description: Provides reservation of seats in premier universities (DU, etc.) and government jobs (Railways, Police, Income Tax, Defense Services) for athletes who have represented at national or international levels.

schemes.name: Khelo India Scheme
schemes.description: Identifies talented players in priority sports disciplines at various levels and provides an annual financial assistance of ₹5 Lakh per athlete for 8 years to support training, nutrition, and equipment.

schemes.name: Sports Authority of India (SAI) Schemes
schemes.description: Operates training centers across the country (STC, SAG, NCOE) providing free residential boarding, world-class coaching, scientific support, sports kit, and competition exposure to talented youths.

schemes.name: Target Olympic Podium Scheme (TOPS)
schemes.description: A flagship program of the Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports to provide high-end, customized support (foreign coaching, international exposure, physiological testing, monthly stipend) to top elite athletes for winning Olympic medals.

schemes.name: State Sports Scholarships
schemes.description: Various state governments provide direct cash rewards, monthly scholarships, and training grants for state level medallists and upcoming athletes representing the respective state.

schemes.name: Panchayat Yuva Krida aur Khel Abhiyan (PYKKA)
schemes.description: A government initiative aimed at developing basic sports infrastructure and organizing youth sports competitions at the village and block panchayat levels to identify rural sporting talent.
